seoTitle: Cape Clear vs Cape Otway — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Cape Clear and Cape Otway. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Cape Clear vs Cape Otway: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cape Clear and Cape Otway.
heading: Cape Clear vs Cape Otway — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cape Clear, Victoria and Cape Otway, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Cape Otway has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Cape Clear (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cape Clear or Cape Otway safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cape Clear has a flood risk score of 46/100, while Cape Otway scores 48/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cape Clear scores 36/100 for bushfire risk. Cape Otway scores 28/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cape Clear or Cape Otway?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Cape Otway has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
